10 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Nov 13 08:40:09 2012
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 /*
15  * \ingroup Law
16  * \brief Outils pour l'�valuation des fonctions
17  *
18  */
19 
20 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Utils/MeshUtils.h"
21 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/FunctionManager.h"

26 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/ContainerTraits.h"

28 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Utils.h"
29 #include <arcane/IMesh.h>
30 
31 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
32 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
33 
34 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
35 
36 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
37 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
38 
39 /*
40  * \ingroup Law
41  * \brief Classe pour l'�valuation des fonctions associ�es � une base
42  * de donn�es de variables
43  *
44  */
45 
46 class FunctionEvaluator
47 {
48 public:
49 
50  using FunctionEnumerator = FunctionManager::Enumerator;
51 
52  FunctionEvaluator(const FunctionManager& f,Integer max_nb_unknowns=0);
53 
54  FunctionEvaluator(const FunctionManager& f, IntegerConstArrayView ids,
55  Integer max_nb_unknowns=0, DerivativesMode dependencies_mode = eComposition);
56 
57 public:
58 
59  template<typename K, template<typename> class Accessor>
60  void evaluate(const Accessor<K>& accessor,
61  Arcane::ItemGroupT<K> group,
62  EvaluationMode mode = eWithoutDerivative)
63  {
64  switch(mode) {
65  case eWithoutDerivative:
66  _evaluate(m_parameters, accessor, group);
67  _evaluate(m_functions, accessor, group);
68  break;
69  case eWithDerivative:
70  evaluateWithDerivatives(accessor, group);
71  break;
72  default:
73  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException("Not implemented");
74  }
75  }
76 
77  template<typename Accessor>
78  void evaluate(const Accessor& accessor,
79  Arcane::ItemGroup group,
80  EvaluationMode mode = eWithoutDerivative)
81  {
82  switch(mode) {
83  case eWithoutDerivative:
84  _evaluate(m_parameters, accessor, group);
85  _evaluate(m_functions, accessor, group);
86  break;
87  case eWithDerivative:
88  evaluateWithDerivatives(accessor, group);
89  break;
90  default:
91  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException("Not implemented");
92  }
93  }
94 
95  template<typename K, template<typename> class Accessor>
96  void evaluateWithDerivatives(const Accessor<K>& accessor, Arcane::ItemGroupT<K> group)
97  {
98  _evaluate(m_parameters, accessor, group);
99  _evaluateWithDerivatives(m_functions, accessor, group);
100  }
101 
102  template<typename Accessor>
103  void evaluateWithDerivatives(const Accessor& accessor, Arcane::ItemGroup group)
104  {
105  _evaluate(m_parameters, accessor, group);
106  _evaluateWithDerivatives(m_functions, accessor, group);
107  }
108 
109  void evaluate(const ArrayAccessor& accessor,
110  Integer begin, Integer end,
111  EvaluationMode mode = eWithoutDerivative);
112 
113  void evaluateWithDerivatives(const ArrayAccessor& accessor, Integer begin, Integer end);
114 
115  void evaluate(const ScalarAccessor& accessor,
116  EvaluationMode mode = eWithoutDerivative);
117 
118  void evaluateWithDerivatives(const ScalarAccessor& accessor);
119 
120  void symbolic_evaluate(const Accessor& accessor, Arcane::ITraceMng* trace);
121 
122 private:
123 
124  template<typename... T>
125  void _evaluate(FunctionEnumerator& functions, const T&... args)
126  {
127  functions.reset();
128  for( ; functions.hasNext(); ++functions)
129  functions.function().evaluate(args..., eWithoutDerivative);
130  }
131 
132  template<typename... T>
133  void _evaluateWithDerivatives(FunctionEnumerator& functions, const T&... args)
134 
135  {
136 
137  functions.reset();
138  for(; functions.hasNext(); ++functions){
139  auto& current_function = functions.function();
140  if(m_function_mng.isRoot(current_function))
141  current_function.evaluate(args..., eWithDerivative, m_max_nb_unknowns);
142  else
143  {
144  Law::PropertyVector graph_dependencies = m_function_mng.dependencies(current_function);
145  std::map<Law::Property, Law::PropertyVector> in_composed_dependencies = m_function_mng.dependenciesGraph(current_function);
146  // a verifier remettre dans le code genere et passer strategie
147  int nb_unknown_resize = graph_dependencies.size() + in_composed_dependencies.size();
148  nb_unknown_resize = (nb_unknown_resize>m_max_nb_unknowns) ? nb_unknown_resize:m_max_nb_unknowns;
149  // voir apres evaluate avec redirection
150  current_function.evaluate(args..., eWithDerivative, nb_unknown_resize);
151  //
152  nb_unknown_resize = graph_dependencies.size();
153  nb_unknown_resize = (nb_unknown_resize>m_max_nb_unknowns) ? nb_unknown_resize:m_max_nb_unknowns;
154  current_function.derivativesCorrection(args..., graph_dependencies, in_composed_dependencies, nb_unknown_resize);
155  }
156  }
157  }
158 
159  void _symbolic_evaluate(const Accessor& accessor, Arcane::ITraceMng* trace, FunctionEnumerator& functions);
160 
161  void _check(const PropertyVector& properties, const Accessor& accessor, Arcane::ITraceMng* trace);
162 
163 private:
164 
165  const FunctionManager& m_function_mng;
166 
167  FunctionEnumerator m_functions;
168 
169  FunctionEnumerator m_parameters;
170 
171  Arcane::Integer m_max_nb_unknowns ;
172 
173  bool m_is_first_derivate_eval;
174 };
175 
176 
177 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
178 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
179 
180 END_LAW_NAMESPACE;
181
